Hero.name: OpenSyria
Hero.slogan: A public data commons for a clearer, more accountable Syria.

Footer.description: OpenSyria is an open source public data commons for reliable Syrian datasets, API access, and civic intelligence.
Footer.licenseNote: Each repository defines its own license.
Footer.principle: Public, non-personal, source-backed reference data only.

HomeDatasets.description: Download source-backed Syrian datasets for cities, governorates, universities, maps, research, journalism, civic tools, and reusable reference data.
HomeDatasets.title: Syrian datasets for maps, research, journalism, and downloads

HomeFaq.description: Short answers about OpenSyria data, downloads, API access, licensing, and contribution paths.

apiAccess.answer: Yes. The read-only datasets API exposes dataset discovery, release metadata, geography endpoints, university endpoints, source attribution, and OpenAPI documentation.
apiAccess.question: Can I use an API instead of downloading files?

availableDatasets.answer: The current catalog focuses on Syrian administrative geography and Syrian universities. Planned areas may expand only when source quality, licensing, and safety requirements are clear.
availableDatasets.question: Which datasets are available now?

contributeCorrections.answer: Open an issue or pull request in the dataset repository that owns the record. Good corrections are focused, source-backed, and include links or citations that maintainers can review.
contributeCorrections.question: How can I suggest a correction?

outOfScope.answer: OpenSyria does not collect personal data, private addresses, student records, security or surveillance datasets, unsourced political claims, or restricted/proprietary data.
outOfScope.question: What data does OpenSyria avoid?

reuseLicense.answer: OpenSyria publishes public, non-personal reference data for reuse. Check each dataset repository license before using release artifacts in production.
reuseLicense.question: Is the data free to use?

whatIsOpenSyria.answer: OpenSyria is an open source public data commons that publishes reliable, source-backed Syrian reference datasets for developers, researchers, journalists, students, and civic projects.
whatIsOpenSyria.question: What is OpenSyria?

HomeFaq.title: What should you know before using OpenSyria?

Datasets.catalogDescription: Browse OpenSyria datasets for Syrian cities, governorates, districts, localities, universities, maps, research, journalism, and JSON/CSV downloads.
Datasets.catalogTitle: Syrian datasets for maps, research, and downloads
Datasets.reuseDescription: OpenSyria publishes public, non-personal, source-backed reference data. Check each repository license before reusing release artifacts in production.
